expectations.text: Applies Norwegian lending rules: 5x income cap, 15% equity requirement, stress test at current rate +3%
expectations.evidence: Detailed stress test calculations showing 7.5% rate, 68,800/month payment. Explicit 5x and 15% checks.

expectations.text: Identifies that 1.5M single income means max 7.5M loan — flags need for dual income or more equity
expectations.evidence: Clear calculation. Also discovers from Skattemelding 2025 that Elsa was a student with no income in 2025.

expectations.text: Considers tax implications of selling shares from ASK
expectations.evidence: Full ASK liquidation scenario with 850K gain * 37.84% = 322K tax. Net 1,188K.

expectations.text: Presents both bull and bear case for the purchase
expectations.evidence: 6-factor adversarial table with probability estimates (40% bull, 25% bear, 35% base).

expectations.text: Models at least 2 financing scenarios with different equity/loan mixes
expectations.evidence: Three scenarios: 11M, 9M, and rent+invest. Full 25-year projections for each.

expectations.text: All key amounts presented in NOK and after-tax
expectations.evidence: Consistent NOK, after-tax ASK calculations, gjeldsrenter deduction, formuesskatt comparison.

expectations.text: Includes Financial Freedom Impact section with FI number calculation (expenses / 3.5% SWR)
expectations.evidence: FI number: ~17.1M NOK (estimated annual expenses 600K / 3.5% SWR). Explicit formula.

expectations.text: States current Freedom Ladder level explicitly
expectations.evidence: Opening status bar: 'Freedom Ladder: Level 1 (Buffer) | FI: ~9% | Target: Level 5'

expectations.text: References specific data from vault notes not mentioned in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Discovered: Elsa's 2025 income status (Skattemelding), existing debt of 206K interest (Skattemelding), insider trading quiet period (KOG Demerger Strategy), demerger timeline April 22, net wealth 319,855 NOK.

expectations.text: Recommends a more conservative approach than the 11M directly asked about
expectations.evidence: Primary recommendation: 'target a property in the 8-9M range.' Shows 9M passes stress test while 11M fails.

expectations.text: Recommends consulting revisor or advokat before executing
expectations.evidence: Opening and closing disclaimers both present.
